name: Turkey with Almond Butter
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Oven roasted breast of turkey
recipeInstructions:
Cut the turkey into eight 1/4-inch slices. Coat with flour; set aside. Lightly brown the almonds in one tablespoon butter in a large skillet; set aside.
Melt another tablespoon of butter in the skillet.
Heat half of the turkey for 2 to 3 minutes on each side, or until lightly browned. Place the turkey on a serving platter and cover to keep warm. Repeat with the remaining butter and turkey.
Combine lemon juice, water, and toasted almonds in the skillet; heat briefly. Pour over the turkey. Makes 4 servings.
